title: Elena Chen
content:
People.ContactEmail elenachen@mccarthy.ca
- University of British Columbia
Elena is a Juris Doctor candidate at the Peter A. Allard School of Law. Prior to law school, she earned a Bachelor of Arts in Political Science with high distinction from the University of British Columbia.
During law school, she volunteered with the UBC Law Review, Pro Bono Students Canada, and the Allard Law Women’s Caucus. In her second year, she participated in the Peter Burns Moot and was awarded Best Direct Examination.
Elena also works as an Executive Coordinator with the Federation of Asian Canadian Lawyers (British Columbia) Society (FACL BC), where she supports initiatives promoting equity and inclusion within the legal profession.
In her spare time, Elena enjoys watching sitcoms, trying new DIY activities, and exploring new trails with her golden retriever.
